notes: OpenAI keys now work for the AI engineer - the app auto-detects Gemini / Claude / OpenAI keys. Wheel buttons now bind on EVERY wheel (new low-level HID input - all buttons, all brands, even beyond 32) with a live preview of what PitWise sees. Big language clean-up: the engineer sticks to YOUR language - no stray Czech or English, units spoken in all 29 languages, and voice car commands understand French, Italian, German, Spanish, Portuguese and Polish. Wheel-only binds fix themselves: close the game and PitWise writes its command keys into ACC automatically. Pit for damage and he plans the stop AND the fuel to the finish - in all 29 languages, dialed into the game for you. Voice speed now goes up to 2x. Clearer errors when an AI key fails. Thanks for the reports - keep them coming on our Discord!
